project.objective: Reconstruct the children of Mary L. Ruse and Albert Raney of Loudon Township, Seneca County, Ohio. Mary L. Raney (b. 11 Apr 1887) is already in the tree; a marriage-record persona, Bertha Belle Raney (also b. 11 Apr 1887), awaits identity resolution.

questions.question: Who were the children of Mary L. Ruse and Albert Raney?
questions.rationale: Primary research objective. A marriage-record persona (Bertha Belle Raney) has been gathered; person-evidence must resolve whether it is the existing daughter Mary L. Raney (I3) or a distinct child.

items.rationale: Marriage records of the couple's children name the parents, tying each child back to Mary L. Ruse and Albert Raney.

log.notes: 1906 marriage of David Fruth and Bertha Belle Raney; the bride is recorded born 11 April 1887 in Loudon Township, Seneca County, Ohio, daughter of Albert Raney. Same birth date as the existing daughter Mary L. Raney (I3).

sources.citation: "Ohio, County Marriages, 1789-2016," entry for David Fruth and Bertha Belle Raney, 8 Feb 1906, Seneca County, Ohio; digital image, FamilySearch.org, accessed 4 May 2026.

citation_detail.where_within: Entry for David Fruth and Bertha Belle Raney

sources.notes: Names the bride's father as Albert Raney; birth recorded 11 April 1887, Loudon Township.

assertions.informant: The bride, reporting to the marriage clerk

assertions.value: 11 April 1887, Loudon Township, Seneca County, Ohio
assertions.informant: The bride, reporting to the marriage clerk

assertions.value: Bertha Belle Raney named as daughter of Albert Raney on her 1906 marriage record
